about.title: About Period Calendar
about.body:
Period Calendar helps you track your cycle and daily notes in one place, with offline support and optional synchronization.

The app is intended for personal tracking and organization. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice.

Project created by https://sito8943.com.

legal.title: Legal information
legal.body: Review these pages to understand terms of use, privacy, and storage technologies.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.body:
By using Period Calendar, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, you should stop using the app.

Last updated: April 12, 2026.

sections.title: 1. Service scope
sections.body: Period Calendar allows users to record and consult personal cycle tracking information and daily notes.

sections.title: 2. Personal use
sections.body: The app is designed for personal use. Users are responsible for the information they enter and how they interpret it.

sections.title: 3. No medical diagnosis
sections.body: App data and estimations are informational only. They do not constitute medical diagnosis, treatment, or medical advice.

sections.title: 4. Account and access
sections.body:
• You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure.
  • You must provide accurate and updated information.
  • Guest mode may have functional limitations.

sections.title: 5. Availability and changes
sections.body: We may perform improvements, changes, or maintenance that can temporarily affect service availability.

sections.title: 6. Privacy and cookies
sections.body: Data handling is described in the Privacy Policy, and storage/cookies usage is described in the Cookies Policy.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of liability
sections.body: The app is provided as is and as available. We are not responsible for decisions made solely based on information recorded in the app.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.body: For legal or technical questions, contact us at https://sito8943.com.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies Policy
cookiesPolicy.body:
This policy explains how cookies and local storage technologies are used in Period Calendar.

Last updated: April 12, 2026.

sections.title: 1. Technologies used
sections.body:
• Technical cookies for basic session functions when applicable.
  • localStorage for preferences and app state.
  • IndexedDB for local persistence and offline functionality.

sections.title: 2. Purpose
sections.body:
• Keep sessions and preferences.
  • Enable offline mode and later synchronization.
  • Improve technical stability and user experience.

sections.title: 3. Legal basis
sections.body: Technologies required to deliver the requested service are used under the applicable legal basis for essential technical functionality.

sections.title: 4. User control
sections.body: You can clear or block cookies and local storage from your browser settings.

sections.title: 5. More information
sections.body: For details about personal data handling, see the Privacy Policy.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body:
This policy explains how personal data is handled in Period Calendar.

Last updated: April 12, 2026.

sections.title: 1. Controller
sections.body: Project controller: sito8943. Contact: https://sito8943.com.

sections.title: 2. Data processed
sections.body:
• Account data (when authentication is used).
  • Profile preferences (language, theme, and settings).
  • User-created tracking records and notes.
  • Technical metadata for app operation and synchronization.

sections.title: 3. Purposes
sections.body:
• Provide and maintain the service.
  • Support local storage and offline usage.
  • Synchronize data when authenticated access is used.
  • Provide technical support and baseline service security.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
sections.body: Data is processed to provide the requested service and under legitimate interest for security and technical continuity.

sections.title: 5. Retention
sections.body: Data is stored while the account is active or until deletion is requested by the user, unless legal obligations require otherwise.

sections.title: 6. User rights
sections.body: You may request access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, or portability where applicable through the project contact channel.

sections.title: 7. Security
sections.body: Reasonable technical and organizational measures are applied to protect information against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.

sections.title: 8. Complaints
sections.body: If you believe processing is not compliant, you may file a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (in Spain, AEPD: https://www.aepd.es).

route.title: Feature unavailable
route.body: The {{module}} module is not enabled in this app.
